notes: Core contribution is a policy-engine architecture with formal governed-action model and an FSM enforcement specification (formal-analysis of safety/liveness properties). Includes a prototype evaluation measuring unsafe-action reduction (~71%) and latency overhead across three workloads, but the evaluation is thinly reported/illustrative (aggregate charts, no dataset or protocol detail). 'Unsafe actions' were rated by human reviewers as annotators, which is not a human-subjects/participant study, so human_subjects=false.
